2463	
2464	static njs_int_t
2465	njs_fs_symlink(njs_vm_t *vm, njs_value_t *args, njs_uint_t nargs,
2466	    njs_index_t calltype, njs_value_t *retval)
2467	{
2468	    njs_int_t           ret;
2469	    const char          *target, *path;
2470	    njs_value_t         *callback, *type;
2471	    njs_opaque_value_t  result;
2472	    char                target_buf[NJS_MAX_PATH + 1],
2473	                        path_buf[NJS_MAX_PATH + 1];
2474	
2475	    target = njs_fs_path(vm, target_buf, njs_arg(args, nargs, 1), "target");
2476	    if (njs_slow_path(target == NULL)) {
2477	        return NJS_ERROR;
2478	    }
2479	
2480	    path = njs_fs_path(vm, path_buf, njs_arg(args, nargs, 2), "path");
2481	    if (njs_slow_path(path == NULL)) {
2482	        return NJS_ERROR;
2483	    }
2484	
2485	    callback = NULL;
2486	    type = njs_arg(args, nargs, 3);
2487	
2488	    if (calltype == NJS_FS_CALLBACK) {
2489	        callback = njs_arg(args, nargs, njs_min(nargs - 1, 4));
2490	        if (!njs_value_is_function(callback)) {
2491	            njs_vm_type_error(vm, "\"callback\" must be a function");
2492	            return NJS_ERROR;
2493	        }
2494	
2495	        if (type == callback) {
2496	            type = njs_value_arg(&njs_value_undefined);
2497	        }
2498	    }
2499	
2500	    if (njs_slow_path(!njs_value_is_undefined(type)
2501	                      && !njs_value_is_string(type)))
2502	    {
2503	        njs_vm_type_error(vm, "\"type\" must be a string");
2504	        return NJS_ERROR;
2505	    }
2506	
2507	    njs_value_undefined_set(njs_value_arg(&result));
2508	
2509	    ret = symlink(target, path);
2510	    if (njs_slow_path(ret != 0)) {
2511	        ret = njs_fs_error(vm, "symlink", strerror(errno), path, errno,
2512	                           &result);
2513	    }
2514	
2515	    if (ret == NJS_OK) {
2516	        return njs_fs_result(vm, &result, calltype, callback, 1, retval);
2517	    }
2518	
2519	    return NJS_ERROR;
2520	}

2562	
2563	static njs_int_t
2564	njs_fs_write(njs_vm_t *vm, njs_value_t *args, njs_uint_t nargs,
2565	    njs_index_t calltype, njs_value_t *retval)
2566	{
2567	    int64_t                      fd, length, pos, offset;
2568	    ssize_t                      n;
2569	    njs_int_t                    ret;
2570	    njs_str_t                    data;
2571	    njs_uint_t                   fd_offset;
2572	    njs_value_t                  *buffer, *value;
2573	    njs_opaque_value_t           result;
2574	    const njs_buffer_encoding_t  *encoding;
2575	
2576	    fd_offset = !!(calltype == NJS_FS_DIRECT);
2577	
2578	    ret = njs_value_to_integer(vm, njs_arg(args, nargs, fd_offset), &fd);
2579	    if (njs_slow_path(ret != NJS_OK)) {
2580	        return ret;
2581	    }
2582	
2583	    buffer = njs_arg(args, nargs, fd_offset + 1);
2584	
2585	    pos = -1;
2586	    encoding = NULL;
2587	
2588	    /*
2589	     * fs.writeSync(fd, string[, position[, encoding]])
2590	     * fh.write(string[, position[, encoding]])
2591	     */
2592	
2593	    if (njs_value_is_string(buffer)) {
2594	        value = njs_arg(args, nargs, fd_offset + 2);
2595	
2596	        if (!njs_value_is_null_or_undefined(value)) {
2597	            ret = njs_value_to_integer(vm, value, &pos);
2598	            if (njs_slow_path(ret != NJS_OK)) {
2599	                return ret;
2600	            }
2601	        }
2602	
2603	        encoding = njs_buffer_encoding(vm, njs_arg(args, nargs, fd_offset + 3),
2604	                                       1);
2605	        if (njs_slow_path(encoding == NULL)) {
2606	            return NJS_ERROR;
2607	        }
2608	
2609	        ret = njs_buffer_decode_string(vm, buffer, njs_value_arg(&result),
2610	                                       encoding);
2611	        if (njs_slow_path(ret != NJS_OK)) {
2612	            return NJS_ERROR;
2613	        }
2614	
2615	        njs_value_string_get(vm, njs_value_arg(&result), &data);
2616	
2617	        goto process;
2618	    }
2619	
2620	    /*
2621	     * fh.write(buffer, offset[, length[, position]])
2622	     * fs.writeSync(fd, buffer, offset[, length[, position]])
2623	     */
2624	
2625	    ret = njs_vm_value_to_bytes(vm, &data, buffer);
2626	    if (njs_slow_path(ret != NJS_OK)) {
2627	        return NJS_ERROR;
2628	    }
2629	
2630	    ret = njs_value_to_integer(vm, njs_arg(args, nargs, fd_offset + 2),
2631	                               &offset);
2632	    if (njs_slow_path(ret != NJS_OK)) {
2633	        return ret;
2634	    }
2635	
2636	    if (njs_slow_path(offset < 0 || (size_t) offset > data.length)) {
2637	        njs_vm_range_error(vm, "offset is out of range (must be <= %z)",
2638	                           data.length);
2639	        return NJS_ERROR;
2640	    }
2641	
2642	    data.length -= offset;
2643	    data.start += offset;
2644	
2645	    value = njs_arg(args, nargs, fd_offset + 3);
2646	
2647	    if (!njs_value_is_undefined(value)) {
2648	        ret = njs_value_to_integer(vm, value, &length);
2649	        if (njs_slow_path(ret != NJS_OK)) {
2650	            return ret;
2651	        }
2652	
2653	        if (njs_slow_path(length < 0 || (size_t) length > data.length)) {
2654	            njs_vm_range_error(vm, "length is out of range (must be <= %z)",
2655	                               data.length);
2656	            return NJS_ERROR;
2657	        }
2658	
2659	        data.length = length;
2660	    }
2661	
2662	    value = njs_arg(args, nargs, fd_offset + 4);
2663	
2664	    if (!njs_value_is_null_or_undefined(value)) {
2665	        ret = njs_value_to_integer(vm, value, &pos);
2666	        if (njs_slow_path(ret != NJS_OK)) {
2667	            return ret;
2668	        }
2669	    }
2670	
2671	process:
2672	
2673	    if (pos == -1) {
2674	        n = write(fd, data.start, data.length);
2675	
2676	    } else {
2677	        n = pwrite(fd, data.start, data.length, pos);
2678	    }
2679	
2680	    if (njs_slow_path(n == -1)) {
2681	        ret = njs_fs_error(vm, "write", strerror(errno), NULL, errno, &result);
2682	        goto done;
2683	    }
2684	
2685	    if (njs_slow_path((size_t) n != data.length)) {
2686	        ret = njs_fs_error(vm, "write", "failed to write all the data", NULL,
2687	                           0, &result);
2688	        goto done;
2689	    }
2690	
2691	    if (calltype == NJS_FS_PROMISE) {
2692	        ret = njs_fs_bytes_written_create(vm, n, buffer, &result);
2693	        if (njs_slow_path(ret != NJS_OK)) {
2694	            goto done;
2695	        }
2696	
2697	    } else {
2698	        njs_value_number_set(njs_value_arg(&result), n);
2699	    }
2700	
2701	done:
2702	
2703	    if (ret == NJS_OK) {
2704	        return njs_fs_result(vm, &result, calltype, NULL, 1, retval);
2705	    }
2706	
2707	    return NJS_ERROR;
2708	}

2710	
2711	static njs_int_t
2712	njs_fs_write_file(njs_vm_t *vm, njs_value_t *args, njs_uint_t nargs,
2713	    njs_index_t magic, njs_value_t *retval)
2714	{
2715	    int                          fd, flags;
2716	    u_char                       *p, *end;
2717	    mode_t                       md;
2718	    ssize_t                      n;
2719	    njs_str_t                    content;
2720	    njs_int_t                    ret;
2721	    const char                   *path;
2722	    njs_value_t                  *data, *callback, *options;
2723	    njs_opaque_value_t           flag, mode, encode, result;
2724	    njs_fs_calltype_t            calltype;
2725	    const njs_buffer_encoding_t  *encoding;
2726	    char                         path_buf[NJS_MAX_PATH + 1];
2727	
2728	    path = njs_fs_path(vm, path_buf, njs_arg(args, nargs, 1), "path");
2729	    if (njs_slow_path(path == NULL)) {
2730	        return NJS_ERROR;
2731	    }
2732	
2733	    callback = NULL;
2734	    calltype = magic & 3;
2735	    options = njs_arg(args, nargs, 3);
2736	
2737	    if (calltype == NJS_FS_CALLBACK) {
2738	        callback = njs_arg(args, nargs, njs_min(nargs - 1, 4));
2739	        if (!njs_value_is_function(callback)) {
2740	            njs_vm_type_error(vm, "\"callback\" must be a function");
2741	            return NJS_ERROR;
2742	        }
2743	
2744	        if (options == callback) {
2745	            options = njs_value_arg(&njs_value_undefined);
2746	        }
2747	    }
2748	
2749	    njs_value_undefined_set(njs_value_arg(&flag));
2750	    njs_value_undefined_set(njs_value_arg(&mode));
2751	    njs_value_undefined_set(njs_value_arg(&encode));
2752	
2753	    if (njs_value_is_string(options)) {
2754	        njs_value_assign(&encode, options);
2755	
2756	    } else if (!njs_value_is_undefined(options)) {
2757	        if (!njs_value_is_object(options)) {
2758	            njs_vm_type_error(vm, "Unknown options type "
2759	                              "(a string or object required)");
2760	            return NJS_ERROR;
2761	        }
2762	
2763	        (void) njs_vm_object_prop(vm, options, &string_flag, &flag);
2764	
2765	        (void) njs_vm_object_prop(vm, options, &string_mode, &mode);
2766	
2767	        (void) njs_vm_object_prop(vm, options, &string_encoding, &encode);
2768	    }
2769	
2770	    data = njs_arg(args, nargs, 2);
2771	
2772	    if (njs_value_is_buffer(data) || njs_value_is_data_view(data)) {
2773	        ret = njs_value_buffer_get(vm, data, &content);
2774	        if (njs_slow_path(ret != NJS_OK)) {
2775	            return NJS_ERROR;
2776	        }
2777	
2778	    } else {
2779	        encoding = njs_buffer_encoding(vm, njs_value_arg(&encode), 1);
2780	        if (njs_slow_path(encoding == NULL)) {
2781	            return NJS_ERROR;
2782	        }
2783	
2784	        ret = njs_value_to_string(vm, njs_value_arg(&result), data);
2785	        if (njs_slow_path(ret != NJS_OK)) {
2786	            return NJS_ERROR;
2787	        }
2788	
2789	        ret = njs_buffer_decode_string(vm, njs_value_arg(&result),
2790	                                       njs_value_arg(&result), encoding);
2791	        if (njs_slow_path(ret != NJS_OK)) {
2792	            return NJS_ERROR;
2793	        }
2794	
2795	        njs_value_string_get(vm, njs_value_arg(&result), &content);
2796	    }
2797	
2798	    flags = njs_fs_flags(vm, njs_value_arg(&flag), O_CREAT | O_WRONLY);
2799	    if (njs_slow_path(flags == -1)) {
2800	        return NJS_ERROR;
2801	    }
2802	
2803	    flags |= ((magic >> 2) == NJS_FS_APPEND) ? O_APPEND : O_TRUNC;
2804	
2805	    md = njs_fs_mode(vm, njs_value_arg(&mode), 0666);
2806	    if (njs_slow_path(md == (mode_t) -1)) {
2807	        return NJS_ERROR;
2808	    }
2809	
2810	    fd = open(path, flags, md);
2811	    if (njs_slow_path(fd < 0)) {
2812	        ret = njs_fs_error(vm, "open", strerror(errno), path, errno, &result);
2813	        goto done;
2814	    }
2815	
2816	    p = content.start;
2817	    end = p + content.length;
2818	
2819	    while (p < end) {
2820	        n = write(fd, p, end - p);
2821	        if (njs_slow_path(n == -1)) {
2822	            if (errno == EINTR) {
2823	                continue;
2824	            }
2825	
2826	            ret = njs_fs_error(vm, "write", strerror(errno), path, errno,
2827	                               &result);
2828	            goto done;
2829	        }
2830	
2831	        p += n;
2832	    }
2833	
2834	    ret = NJS_OK;
2835	    njs_value_undefined_set(njs_value_arg(&result));
2836	
2837	done:
2838	
2839	    if (fd != -1) {
2840	        (void) close(fd);
2841	    }
2842	
2843	    if (ret == NJS_OK) {
2844	        return njs_fs_result(vm, &result, calltype, callback, 1, retval);
2845	    }
2846	
2847	    return NJS_ERROR;
2848	}

2850	
2851	static njs_int_t
2852	njs_fs_fd_read(njs_vm_t *vm, int fd, njs_str_t *data)
2853	{
2854	    u_char   *p, *end, *start;
2855	    size_t   size;
2856	    ssize_t  n;
2857	
2858	    size = data->length;
2859	
2860	    if (size == 0) {
2861	        size = 4096;
2862	    }
2863	
2864	    data->start = njs_mp_alloc(njs_vm_memory_pool(vm), size);
2865	    if (data->start == NULL) {
2866	        njs_vm_memory_error(vm);
2867	        return NJS_ERROR;
2868	    }
2869	
2870	    p = data->start;
2871	    end = p + size;
2872	
2873	    for ( ;; ) {
2874	        n = read(fd, p, end - p);
2875	
2876	        if (njs_slow_path(n < 0)) {
2877	            return NJS_DECLINED;
2878	        }
2879	
2880	        p += n;
2881	
2882	        if (n == 0) {
2883	            break;
2884	        }
2885	
2886	        if (end - p < 2048) {
2887	            size *= 2;
2888	
2889	            start = njs_mp_alloc(njs_vm_memory_pool(vm), size);
2890	            if (start == NULL) {
2891	                njs_vm_memory_error(vm);
2892	                return NJS_ERROR;
2893	            }
2894	
2895	            memcpy(start, data->start, p - data->start);
2896	
2897	            njs_mp_free(njs_vm_memory_pool(vm), data->start);
2898	
2899	            p = start + (p - data->start);
2900	            end = start + size;
2901	            data->start = start;
2902	        }
2903	    }
2904	
2905	    data->length = p - data->start;
2906	
2907	    return NJS_OK;
2908	}
2909	
2910

2912	njs_fs_make_path(njs_vm_t *vm, char *path, mode_t md, njs_bool_t recursive,
2913	    njs_opaque_value_t *retval)
2914	{

2916	    njs_int_t    ret;
2917	    const char   *p, *prev, *end;
2918	    struct stat  sb;

2921	
2922	    end = path + njs_strlen(path);

2926	        if (ret != 0) {
2927	            err = errno;
2928	            goto failed;
2929	        }
2930	
2931	        return NJS_OK;
2932	    }

file.content:
# Copyright (C) Igor Sysoev
# Copyright (C) NGINX, Inc.

. auto/deps

echo "creating $NJS_MAKEFILE"

mkdir -p $NJS_BUILD_DIR/src
mkdir -p $NJS_BUILD_DIR/external
mkdir -p $NJS_BUILD_DIR/$NJS_BUILD_DIR
mkdir -p $NJS_BUILD_DIR/test

njs_modules_c=$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_modules.c

NJS_LIB_SRCS="$NJS_LIB_SRCS $njs_modules_c"

cat << END                                    > $njs_modules_c

#include <njs_main.h>

END

for mod in $NJS_LIB_MODULES
do
    echo "extern njs_module_t  $mod;"         >> $njs_modules_c
done

echo                                          >> $njs_modules_c
echo 'njs_module_t *njs_modules[] = {'        >> $njs_modules_c

for mod in $NJS_LIB_MODULES
do
    echo "    &$mod,"                         >> $njs_modules_c
done

cat << END                                    >> $njs_modules_c
    NULL
};

END

qjs_modules_c=$NJS_BUILD_DIR/qjs_modules.c

QJS_LIB_SRCS="$QJS_LIB_SRCS $qjs_modules_c"

cat << END                                    > $qjs_modules_c

#include <qjs.h>

END

for mod in $QJS_LIB_MODULES
do
    echo "extern qjs_module_t  $mod;"         >> $qjs_modules_c
done

echo                                          >> $qjs_modules_c
echo 'qjs_module_t *qjs_modules[] = {'        >> $qjs_modules_c

for mod in $QJS_LIB_MODULES
do
    echo "    &$mod,"                         >> $qjs_modules_c
done

cat << END                                    >> $qjs_modules_c
    NULL
};

END

njs_incs=`echo $NJS_LIB_INCS \
        | sed -e "s# *\([^ ]*\)#$njs_regex_cont-I\1#g"`
njs_objs=`echo $NJS_LIB_SRCS \
        | sed -e "s# *\([^ ]*\.\)c#$NJS_BUILD_DIR/\1o$njs_regex_cont#g"`

qjs_objs=`echo $QJS_LIB_SRCS \
        | sed -e "s# *\([^ ]*\.\)c#$NJS_BUILD_DIR/\1o$njs_regex_cont#g"`

QJS_LIB=""
if [ $NJS_HAVE_QUICKJS = YES ]; then
    QJS_LIB="$NJS_BUILD_DIR/libqjs.a"
fi

cat << END > $NJS_MAKEFILE

# This file is auto-generated by configure

NJS_CC = ${CC}
NJS_STATIC_LINK = ${AR} -r -c
NJS_LINK = ${CC} ${NJS_LD_OPT} ${NJS_LINK}
NJS_PIC = ${NJS_PIC}
CFLAGS = ${NJS_CC_OPT} ${CFLAGS:-${NJS_CFLAGS}}
NJS_LIB_AUX_CFLAGS = ${NJS_LIB_AUX_CFLAGS}

NJS_VER = $(grep NJS_VERSION src/njs.h | sed -e 's#.*"\(.*\)".*#\1#')
NJS_TYPES_VER = \$(NJS_VER)

NPM = npm

default: njs

NJS_LIB_INCS = $njs_incs
NJS_LIB_OBJS = $njs_objs
QJS_LIB_OBJS = $qjs_objs

libnjs: $NJS_BUILD_DIR/libnjs.a pc
libqjs: $NJS_BUILD_DIR/libqjs.a

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/libnjs.a:   \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_auto_config.h \\
	\$(NJS_LIB_OBJS)

	\$(NJS_STATIC_LINK) $NJS_BUILD_DIR/libnjs.a \\
		\$(NJS_LIB_OBJS)

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/libqjs.a:   \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_auto_config.h \\
	\$(QJS_LIB_OBJS)

	\$(NJS_STATIC_LINK) $NJS_BUILD_DIR/libqjs.a \\
		\$(QJS_LIB_OBJS)
END

# object files.

for njs_src in $NJS_LIB_SRCS
do
    njs_obj="${njs_src%.c}.o"
    njs_dep="${njs_src%.c}.dep"
    njs_dep_flags=`njs_gen_dep_flags $njs_dep $njs_obj`
    njs_dep_post=`njs_gen_dep_post $njs_dep $njs_obj`
    cat << END >> $NJS_MAKEFILE

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_obj: $njs_src
	\$(NJS_CC) -c \$(NJS_LIB_INCS) \$(NJS_PIC) \$(CFLAGS) \\
		\$(NJS_LIB_AUX_CFLAGS) \\
		-o $NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_obj \\
		$njs_dep_flags \\
		$njs_src
		$njs_dep_post

-include $NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_dep

END

done

for njs_src in $QJS_LIB_SRCS
do
    njs_obj="${njs_src%.c}.o"
    njs_dep="${njs_src%.c}.dep"
    njs_dep_flags=`njs_gen_dep_flags $njs_dep $njs_obj`
    njs_dep_post=`njs_gen_dep_post $njs_dep $njs_obj`
    cat << END >> $NJS_MAKEFILE

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_obj: $njs_src
	\$(NJS_CC) -c \$(NJS_LIB_INCS) \$(NJS_PIC) \$(CFLAGS) \\
		\$(NJS_LIB_AUX_CFLAGS) \\
		-o $NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_obj \\
		$njs_dep_flags \\
		$njs_src
		$njs_dep_post

-include $NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_dep

END

done

# njs cli.

cat << END >> $NJS_MAKEFILE

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs: \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/libnjs.a $QJS_LIB \\
	external/njs_shell.c
	\$(NJS_LINK) -o $NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs \$(NJS_LIB_INCS) \\
		\$(CFLAGS) \$(NJS_LIB_AUX_CFLAGS)\\
		external/njs_shell.c \\
		$NJS_BUILD_DIR/libnjs.a $QJS_LIB \\
		$NJS_LD_OPT -lm $NJS_LIBS $NJS_LIB_AUX_LIBS $NJS_READLINE_LIB

END

# njs fuzzer.

cat << END >> $NJS_MAKEFILE

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_process_script_fuzzer.o: \\
	external/njs_shell.c
	\$(NJS_CC) -c \$(NJS_LIB_INCS) \$(CFLAGS) \\
		\$(NJS_LIB_AUX_CFLAGS) \\
		-DNJS_FUZZER_TARGET \\
		-o $NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_process_script_fuzzer.o \\
		external/njs_shell.c

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_process_script_fuzzer: \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/libnjs.a \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_process_script_fuzzer.o
	\$(CXX) \$(CXXFLAGS) -o $NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_process_script_fuzzer \\
		\$(NJS_LIB_AUX_CFLAGS) \\
		\$(LIB_FUZZING_ENGINE) \\
		$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_process_script_fuzzer.o \\
		$NJS_BUILD_DIR/libnjs.a \\
		-lm $NJS_LIBS $NJS_LIB_AUX_LIBS

END

# lib tests.

for njs_src in $NJS_LIB_TEST_SRCS
do
    fname=$(basename $njs_src)
    njs_dep="test/${fname%.c}.dep"
    njs_bin="${fname%.c}"
    njs_dep_flags=`njs_gen_dep_flags $njs_dep $fname`
    njs_dep_post=`njs_gen_dep_post $njs_dep $fname`
    cat << END >> $NJS_MAKEFILE

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_bin: $njs_src \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/libnjs.a
	\$(NJS_LINK) -o $NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_bin \$(NJS_LIB_INCS) \\
		\$(CFLAGS) $njs_dep_flags \\
		$njs_src $NJS_BUILD_DIR/libnjs.a \\
		$njs_dep_post -lm $NJS_LD_OPT

-include $NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_dep

END

done


# njs tests.

njs_src="src/test/njs_externals_test.c"
fname=$(basename $njs_src)
njs_externals_obj="test/${fname%.c}.o"
njs_dep="test/${fname%.c}.dep"
njs_dep_flags=`njs_gen_dep_flags $njs_dep $njs_externals_obj`
njs_dep_post=`njs_gen_dep_post $njs_dep $njs_externals_obj`

cat << END >> $NJS_MAKEFILE

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_externals_obj: \\
    $njs_src
	\$(NJS_CC) -c \$(NJS_LIB_INCS) \$(CFLAGS) \\
		\$(NJS_LIB_AUX_CFLAGS) \\
		-o $NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_externals_obj \\
		$njs_dep_flags \\
		$njs_src
		$njs_dep_post

-include $NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_dep

END

for njs_src in $NJS_TEST_SRCS
do
    fname=$(basename $njs_src)
    njs_dep="test/${fname%.c}.dep"
    njs_bin="${fname%.c}"
    njs_dep_flags=`njs_gen_dep_flags $njs_dep $fname`
    njs_dep_post=`njs_gen_dep_post $njs_dep $fname`
    cat << END >> $NJS_MAKEFILE

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_bin: $njs_src \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/libnjs.a \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_externals_obj
	\$(NJS_LINK) -o $NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_bin \$(NJS_LIB_INCS) \\
		\$(CFLAGS) \$(NJS_LIB_AUX_CFLAGS) \\
		$njs_dep_flags \\
		$NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_externals_obj \\
		$njs_src $NJS_BUILD_DIR/libnjs.a \\
		$NJS_LD_OPT -lm $NJS_LIBS $NJS_LIB_AUX_LIBS
		$njs_dep_post

-include $NJS_BUILD_DIR/$njs_dep

END

done

# main targets.

cat << END >> $NJS_MAKEFILE

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_auto_config.h:
	@echo
	@echo " Please run ./configure before make"
	@echo
	@exit 1

all: $NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_auto_config.h \\
	njs ts test lib_test benchmark

njs: $NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_auto_config.h $NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs
njs_fuzzer: $NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_auto_config.h \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_process_script_fuzzer

lib_test: $NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_auto_config.h \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/random_unit_test \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/rbtree_unit_test \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/flathsh_unit_test \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/unicode_unit_test

	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/random_unit_test
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/rbtree_unit_test
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/flathsh_unit_test
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/unicode_unit_test

test262_njs: njs
	test/test262 --binary=$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs

unit_test: $NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_auto_config.h \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_unit_test

	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_unit_test

test: shell_test unit_test test262

benchmark: $NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_auto_config.h \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_benchmark

	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_benchmark

dist:
	rm -rf njs-\$(NJS_VER) \\
	&& hg archive njs-\$(NJS_VER).tar.gz \\
		-p njs-\$(NJS_VER) \\
		-X ".hg*" \\
	&& echo njs-\$(NJS_VER).tar.gz done
END

if [ $NJS_HAVE_QUICKJS = YES ]; then
    cat << END >> $NJS_MAKEFILE

test262: njs test262_njs test262_quickjs

test262_quickjs: njs
	NJS_SKIP_LIST="test/js/promise_rejection_tracker_recursive.t.js \\
test/js/async_exception_in_await.t.js" \\
	test/test262 --binary='$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs -n QuickJS -m'
END

else
    cat << END >> $NJS_MAKEFILE

test262: njs test262_njs
END

fi


njs_ts_deps=`echo $NJS_TS_SRCS \
        | sed -e "s# *\([^ ][^ ]*\)#\1$njs_regex_cont#g"`

njs_test_ts_deps=`echo $NJS_TEST_TS_SRCS \
        | sed -e "s# *\([^ ][^ ]*\)#\1$njs_regex_cont#g"`

cat << END >> $NJS_MAKEFILE

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/ts/package.json: $njs_ts_deps
	cp -fr ts $NJS_BUILD_DIR/
	cp LICENSE $NJS_BUILD_DIR/ts/
	sed 's#__VERSION__#"\$(NJS_TYPES_VER)"#' \\
		ts/package.json > $NJS_BUILD_DIR/ts/package.json

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/ts/node_modules: $NJS_BUILD_DIR/ts/package.json
	cd $NJS_BUILD_DIR/ts && \$(NPM) install
	touch $NJS_BUILD_DIR/ts/node_modules

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs-types-\$(NJS_TYPES_VER).tgz: $NJS_BUILD_DIR/ts/package.json
	hg id -i > $NJS_BUILD_DIR/ts/COMMITHASH || true
	cd $NJS_BUILD_DIR && \$(NPM) pack ./ts

.PHONY: ts
ts: $NJS_BUILD_DIR/ts/package.json

ts_lint: $NJS_BUILD_DIR/ts/node_modules
	cd $NJS_BUILD_DIR/ts && \$(NPM) run lint

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/test/ts/package.json: $njs_test_ts_deps
	mkdir -p $NJS_BUILD_DIR/test
	cp -fr test/ts $NJS_BUILD_DIR/test/

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/test/ts/node_modules: \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs-types-\$(NJS_TYPES_VER).tgz \\
	$NJS_BUILD_DIR/test/ts/package.json
	cd $NJS_BUILD_DIR/test/ts && \$(NPM) install \\
		--save-dev file:../../njs-types-\$(NJS_TYPES_VER).tgz
	cd $NJS_BUILD_DIR/test/ts && \$(NPM) install
	touch $NJS_BUILD_DIR/test/ts/node_modules

ts_test: $NJS_BUILD_DIR/test/ts/node_modules
	cd $NJS_BUILD_DIR/test/ts && \$(NPM) test

ts_publish: ts_clean $NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs-types-\$(NJS_TYPES_VER).tgz
	cd $NJS_BUILD_DIR/ && \$(NPM) publish njs-types-\$(NJS_TYPES_VER).tgz

ts_clean:
	rm -rf $NJS_BUILD_DIR/ts
END

# pkg-config file
cat << END >> $NJS_MAKEFILE

pc: $NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs.pc

$NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs.pc: $NJS_BUILD_DIR/njs_auto_config.h
	sed -e "s#@PREFIX@#$(pwd)/$NJS_BUILD_DIR#" \\
		-e "s#@LIBDIR@#$(pwd)/$NJS_BUILD_DIR#" \\
		-e "s#@CFLAGS@#-I$(pwd)/$NJS_BUILD_DIR -I$(pwd)/src#" \\
		-e "s#@VERSION@#\$(NJS_VER)#" \\
		-e "s#@EXTRA_LIBS@#-lm $NJS_LIBS $NJS_LIB_AUX_LIBS#" \\
		src/njs.pc.in > \$@
END

# Makefile.

cat << END > Makefile

# This file is auto-generated by configure

include $NJS_MAKEFILE

.PHONY: clean
clean:
	rm -rf $NJS_BUILD_DIR Makefile

END

njs-tutorial/u6-l1-quickjs-wrapper.md-340-1. **它该放在哪？** 这个函数无状态、纯函数，参考 [qjs.c:168-188](https://github.com/nginx/njs/blob/f078f14372ee789ea1435f35672407c13917b5e7/src/qjs.c#L168-L188) 的 `qjs_add_intrinsic_btoa_atob`，写出你设计的 `qjs_add_intrinsic_hash` 函数骨架（只需说明：是否要 `JS_NewClass`、怎么造 `JSValue func`、怎么挂全局）。
njs-tutorial/u6-l1-quickjs-wrapper.md-341-2. **它何时被调用？** 参照 [qjs.c:272-288](https://github.com/nginx/njs/blob/f078f14372ee789ea1435f35672407c13917b5e7/src/qjs.c#L272-L288)，写出在 `qjs_new_context` 里加一行调用的位置，并说明为什么必须放在模块注册（[qjs.c:258-270](https://github.com/nginx/njs/blob/f078f14372ee789ea1435f35672407c13917b5e7/src/qjs.c#L258-L270)）之后。
njs-tutorial/u6-l1-quickjs-wrapper.md:342:3. **CLI 和 NGINX 都会自动有它吗？** 结合 4.1.3 两个调用点（[njs_shell.c:2726](https://github.com/nginx/njs/blob/f078f14372ee789ea1435f35672407c13917b5e7/external/njs_shell.c#L2726) 与 [nginx/ngx_js.c:979](https://github.com/nginx/njs/blob/f078f14372ee789ea1435f35672407c13917b5e7/nginx/ngx_js.c#L979)）回答，并指出这和把功能做成 `qjs_module_t` 走 `qjs_modules[]`/`addons`（4.2）有什么不同。

/home/runner/work/codeReader/codeReader/work/nginx-njs/njs-tutorial/u6-l1-quickjs-wrapper.md-356-- `qjs_new_context(rt, addons)` 是 njs 包装 QuickJS 的唯一入口：用 `JS_NewContextRaw` 建空壳，逐个 `JS_AddIntrinsic*` 点齐语言特性，再注册模块、补全局对象、删危险全局。
njs-tutorial/u6-l1-quickjs-wrapper.md:357:- 模块注册有两条对等通道：构建期生成的全局清单 `qjs_modules[]`（fs/query_string/buffer 等通用模块）和运行期由嵌入者传入的 `addons`（NGINX 的 `r`/`s`/`ngx` 等宿主模块）；CLI 传 `NULL` 屏蔽宿主模块。
/home/runner/work/codeReader/codeReader/work/nginx-njs/njs-tutorial/u6-l1-quickjs-wrapper.md-358-- `qjs_module_t{name, init}` 的 `init` 返回 `JSModuleDef *`，意味着 QuickJS 侧扩展天然是「可 `import` 的 ES 模块」；这和 njs 内置引擎 `njs_module_t{preinit, init}`（返回状态码、挂原型）的形态本质不同。
/home/runner/work/codeReader/codeReader/work/nginx-njs/njs-tutorial/u6-l1-quickjs-wrapper.md-359-- `QJS_CORE_CLASS_ID_*` 集中定义、从 64 起编（避开 QuickJS 内建类 1..63），供 Buffer/TextDecoder/fs/xml 等跨模块共享。
/home/runner/work/codeReader/codeReader/work/nginx-njs/njs-tutorial/u6-l1-quickjs-wrapper.md-360-- `qjs_add_intrinsic_*` 系列替 QuickJS 补上 `btoa/atob`（HEAD 刚补）、`TextEncoder/TextDecoder`、`njs` 等全局；同时反向删掉 `eval`/`Function` 做安全裁剪。`process` 不在其中，而是由 qjs.c 供给、宿主（CLI/NGINX）挂载。

/home/runner/work/codeReader/codeReader/work/nginx-njs/njs-tutorial/u1-l2-directory-and-build-system.md-335-**练习 2：** 如果我想让 `xml` 模块在没装 libxml2 时也能编译，应该改哪里？这样改合理吗？  
/home/runner/work/codeReader/codeReader/work/nginx-njs/njs-tutorial/u1-l2-directory-and-build-system.md-336-**参考答案：** 表面上可以去掉 `auto/modules` L24 的 `if [ $NJS_LIBXML2 = YES -a $NJS_HAVE_LIBXML2 = YES ]` 条件让它无条件注册，但 `external/njs_xml_module.c` 的实现依赖 libxml2 头文件和符号，没装 libxml2 时**编译会失败**。所以不合理——xml 模块本质上需要 libxml2，正确做法是先装依赖再 `--libxml2=YES`。
/home/runner/work/codeReader/codeReader/work/nginx-njs/njs-tutorial/u1-l2-directory-and-build-system.md-337-
njs-tutorial/u1-l2-directory-and-build-system.md:338:**练习 3：** `auto/make` 生成的 `build/njs_modules.c` 文件里那个 `njs_modules[]` 数组有什么用？  
njs-tutorial/u1-l2-directory-and-build-system.md:339:**参考答案：** 它是引擎启动时的「模块初始化清单」。引擎在 `njs_builtin.c` 等初始化代码里会遍历 `njs_modules[]`，逐个调用每个模块的初始化函数，从而把 `fs`、`crypto` 等扩展能力挂到 JS 全局对象上。`qjs_modules[]` 数组对 QuickJS 引擎起同样作用。
/home/runner/work/codeReader/codeReader/work/nginx-njs/njs-tutorial/u1-l2-directory-and-build-system.md-340-

/home/runner/work/codeReader/codeReader/work/nginx-njs/njs-tutorial/u1-l2-directory-and-build-system.md-377-- `configure` 是一个 66 行的「指挥官」，按「准备 → 特性检测（19 个脚本）→ 清单收集 → 生成」四阶段顺序 `source` 各个 `auto/*.sh`，最终产出 `build/Makefile`。
/home/runner/work/codeReader/codeReader/work/nginx-njs/njs-tutorial/u1-l2-directory-and-build-system.md-378-- 源码/模块用 shell 变量当清单：`auto/sources` 固定列出 48 个内核 `.c`，`auto/modules`/`auto/qjs_modules` 登记扩展模块并通过 `auto/module`/`auto/qjs_module` 把模块源文件追加进编译清单。
/home/runner/work/codeReader/codeReader/work/nginx-njs/njs-tutorial/u1-l2-directory-and-build-system.md-379-- 扩展模块可按条件注册（如 crypto/webcrypto 依赖 OpenSSL、xml 依赖 libxml2、zlib 依赖 zlib），最终编进二进制的模块集合由 `configure` 的探测结果决定。
njs-tutorial/u1-l2-directory-and-build-system.md:380:- `auto/make` 会在构建期动态生成 `njs_modules.c`/`qjs_modules.c` 两个胶水文件，它们定义的 `njs_modules[]`/`qjs_modules[]` 数组是引擎启动时初始化所有扩展模块的入口。
/home/runner/work/codeReader/codeReader/work/nginx-njs/njs-tutorial/u1-l2-directory-and-build-system.md-381-


**njs_fs_init** - external/njs_fs_module.c:3890-3950
- Checks `njs_vm_options(vm)->sandbox`, returns NJS_OK if sandboxed (fs disabled).
- Registers 5 external prototypes via `njs_vm_external_prototype` (stats, dirent, filehandle, bytes_read, bytes_written).
- Creates the fs object via `njs_vm_external_create` and registers it as a module via `njs_vm_add_module(vm, &njs_str_value("fs"), ...)`.

**qjs_fs_init** - external/qjs_fs_module.c:2958+
- Returns `JSModuleDef *` (NULL on failure).
- Uses `JS_NewClass` with `QJS_CORE_CLASS_ID_FS_STATS`, `QJS_CORE_CLASS_ID_FS_DIRENT`, `QJS_CORE_CLASS_ID_FS_FILEHANDLE`.
- Uses `JS_SetPropertyFunctionList` to register methods on proto.

Now I have a clear picture. Note an interesting asymmetry: fs in njs_modules is unconditional (no if guard), but in qjs_modules it's also unconditional. However, crypto/webcrypto/xml/zlib are guarded by feature detection in both. Buffer is unconditional in both. query_string is unconditional in both. This is good for the lecture - I can note that fs and query_string and buffer are always built, while crypto/xml/zlib are conditional.

Wait, let me double check the asymmetry more carefully:

- auto/qjs_modules: buffer (always), crypto (if openssl), fs (always), query_string (always), webcrypto (if openssl), xml (if libxml2), zlib (if zlib)

So the feature sets are similar but ordering differs slightly. Both register fs unconditionally. Good.

Now, one more important detail for the "sync both" practice: when you change fs behavior, you must edit BOTH:
1. external/njs_fs_module.c (njs engine path) 
2. external/qjs_fs_module.c (QuickJS engine path)
And they're separately listed in auto/modules and auto/qjs_modules respectively. The `njs_modules.c` and `qjs_modules.c` are auto-generated so you don't edit those directly.
